title: Floor 4: Wing / PType / OHU Recognition
purpose: Practice distinguishing overdeveloped, healthy, and underdeveloped expressions.

questions.prompt: The plan changes and Donte says, 'Move. I’ll handle it myself.' Which OHU expression is this?
questions.hint: Overdeveloped D often over-controls under pressure.

questions.prompt: The plan changes and Donte says, 'Okay. What matters most right now?' Which OHU expression is this?
questions.hint: Healthy D keeps direction while staying responsive.

questions.prompt: The plan changes and Donte says, 'Forget it. Nobody listens anyway.' Which OHU expression is this?
questions.hint: Underdeveloped D can collapse into resignation when agency feels blocked.
